text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The book is real and well-documented. It is "Spline Models for Observational Data" (not "Splines Models") by Grace Wahba (G. Wahba), published in 1990 in the CBMS-NSF Regional Conference Series in Applied Mathematics by SIAM. The cited title contains only a minor typo ("Splines" instead of "Spline"), but the author and venue match perfectly.
LINK: https://epubs.siam.org/doi/book/10.1137/1.9781611970128
